description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The Instance Total RRC for an Instance is equal to the sum of the Instance Financial RRC, Instance Smart Contract

RRC for that Instance. See [A.3.2.1.1.4 - Instance Financial RRC](ba1d5c0e-399f-47a6-b5d4-b3f5477d5787), [A.3.2.1.1.5 - Instance Smart Contract RRC](4b4ea578-28b4-481c-9abd-d34c5a4f383c), and [A.3.2.1.1.6 - Instance Administrative RRC](c2b60f0d-6555-463c-9ad3-2a9746be77c5).
summary: Correct RRC And CRR Terminology In Risk Framework
description: Corrects "Instance Smart Contract Risk RRC" to "Instance Smart Contract RRC" and "Instance Financial RRC Ratio" to "Instance Financial CRR".

As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.
